name: Salesforce
one_liner: Cloud CRM giant for sales, service, and marketing workflows.
notes: REST is broad; MCP servers exist via community (e.g. forcing sf-mcp). [verified] MCP upgraded from yes-community → yes-official (Salesforce now hosts official MCP servers).

name: HubSpot
one_liner: Inbound marketing + sales CRM with broad object model.
notes: Private App tokens replacing legacy API keys; community MCP exists.

name: Pipedrive
one_liner: Sales pipeline CRM focused on deal stages.
gating_reason: Free trial; API token in app
notes: Straightforward REST; no first-party MCP.

name: Attio
one_liner: Developer-first CRM with custom objects and flexible records.
notes: Modern REST API; community MCP server exists.

name: Twenty
notes: Open-source; MCP wrapper available via community.

name: Podio
one_liner: Citrix-owned work management platform with custom apps.
notes: Mature but legacy; no recent MCP work.

name: Zoho CRM
one_liner: Zoho's flagship CRM with broad suite integrations.
notes: REST v8; Zoho-wide OAuth; community MCPs exist.

name: Close
one_liner: Inside-sales CRM with strong calling/SMS features.
gating_reason: Free trial; API key in app
notes: REST is well-documented; no MCP yet.

name: Copper
notes: REST is solid; no MCP.

name: DealCloud
one_liner: Intapp's deal/relationship CRM for financial services.
notes: Docs are public but access is gated; not for self-serve agent toolkits.

name: Zendesk
one_liner: Ticketing + helpdesk platform with broad CX suite.
gating_reason: Free trial; Support plan needed for prod
notes: REST API is broad; community MCP servers exist.

name: Intercom
notes: REST + Core API; community MCP exists.

name: Freshdesk
gating_reason: Free tier; API key in app
notes: Blossom/Garden/Estate tiers gate some endpoints.

name: Front
one_liner: Shared inbox + CRM-lite for team comms.
notes: REST + partners API; no first-party MCP.

name: Pylon
one_liner: B2B support tool with Slack-first ticketing.
notes: Newer API; some community MCP wrappers.

name: LiveAgent
gating_reason: Free tier; API key in panel
notes: REST API is adequate; no MCP.

name: Plain
one_liner: API-first modern support tool for devs.
notes: GraphQL-first; good for agent tooling. [verified] MCP downgraded from yes-community → no (no Plain-specific MCP server found in search).

name: Help Scout
notes: REST v2 is clean; no MCP.

name: Gorgias
notes: REST API; tight Shopify integration.

name: Gladly
one_liner: Customer service platform focused on conversation continuity.
gating_reason: Enterprise sales; dev access via partnership
main_blocker: Enterprise sales motion; no self-serve dev portal
notes: Docs are public but credentials require partnership.

name: Slack
one_liner: Team messaging with rich app ecosystem.
notes: Official MCP server exists; gold-standard agent toolkit.

name: Twilio
notes: REST is huge; community MCP wrappers.

name: Telegram
